title: Monsters Unlimited
description: A challenging Minecraft mod featuring boss monsters! Starting from day ten, a powerful boss monster will appear in your world every five days.
body:
Monsters Unlimited

MzaiB's Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/13017834
Bilibili Gameplay: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV15U6BBvEnH/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=336fc11ef8478019fd913a1da19a7e3b
YouTube Gameplay: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BLAhrkbs-wY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A challenging Minecraft mod featuring boss monsters! Starting from day ten, a powerful boss monster will appear in your world every five days. bringing destruction and chaos. Prepare your weapons, gather your allies, and face the ultimate challenge — survive the endless onslaught of monsters!


Core Gameplay

Boss Invasion System — Every 5 in-game days, a fearsome boss monster spawns in your world. Each boss brings unique attack patterns, devastating abilities, and valuable loot. Can you survive them all?

Progressive Difficulty — As you defeat more bosses, stronger and more dangerous monsters will appear. The challenge never ends!

Epic Boss Battles — Face off against massive 3D boss monsters with custom models, animations, and sound effects powered by GeckoLib.


Key Features

Timed Boss Spawning — A new boss appears every 5 days, keeping you on your toes
Unique Boss Mechanics — Each boss has distinct attack patterns and abilities
Custom 3D Models — Detailed GeckoLib models with stunning animations
Rewarding Loot — Defeat bosses to earn powerful items and equipment
Multiplayer Compatible — Team up with friends to take down bosses together


Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1
NeoForge 21.1.209+
GeckoLib 4.7+ (Required)
Pehkui


Credits

Project Lead: M仔B
Special thanks to the 特补制作组 team!

IMPORTANT: This mod is completely FREE. If you paid for it anywhere, you have been scammed.
Author: M仔B | Search "M仔B" on Bilibili for the official download.
